raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"What is the primary type of help you need for this section: checking logical consistency and argument chain (R1.2), aligning claims with reported evidence (R1.3), polishing sentence-level writing and flow (R1.6), or reorganizing the structure and narrative arc (R1.5)?","rationale":{"RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing in assisting with a research section to ensure transparent reporting of limitations and variabilities in the results.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration of findings and maintain accuracy in the evaluation discussion.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep any assistance focused strictly on the provided section without extraneous additions.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to mitigate risks from potentially misleading confidence claims in tool-use agent deployments.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to track any suggested modifications back to the original artifact for verifiability."}}

parsed.clarification_question: What is the primary type of help you need for this section: checking logical consistency and argument chain (R1.2), aligning claims with reported evidence (R1.3), polishing sentence-level writing and flow (R1.6), or reorganizing the structure and narrative arc (R1.5)?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing in assisting with a research section to ensure transparent reporting of limitations and variabilities in the results.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration of findings and maintain accuracy in the evaluation discussion.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep any assistance focused strictly on the provided section without extraneous additions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to mitigate risks from potentially misleading confidence claims in tool-use agent deployments.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to track any suggested modifications back to the original artifact for verifiability.
